title: coreopsis foliosa
intro: Coreopsis foliosa, also known as the leafy coreopsis, is a species of flowering plant in the sunflower family that is native to the southeastern United States. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The leafy coreopsis has been used to treat various health issues, including digestive problems, skin conditions, and respiratory issues, and its health benefits include reducing inflammation and improving immune function. Herbal preparations of the plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
